basics.name: Om Kumar
basics.label: Undergraduate Researcher in Machine Learning & Robotics
basics.summary: Undergraduate student in Mathematics and Computing at MIT Manipal with experience in 3D vision, generative models, and autonomous systems. Worked on Gaussian Splatting, diffusion-based view synthesis, and medical imaging. Actively involved in robotics competitions and large-scale research projects.

work.name: Max Planck Institute for Intelligent Systems
work.summary: Selected as a Machine Learning Intern for Summer 2026.

work.name: NISER Bhubaneswar (Netweb Technologies)
work.summary: Worked on 3D Gaussian Splatting and novel view synthesis.
highlights: Developed post-hoc floater removal pipeline reducing Gaussian count to 20.4% while improving PSNR by +4.75 dB
Built multi-view diffusion framework improving PSNR (+10%), SSIM (+15%), and LPIPS (-20%)
Accelerated 3D reconstruction pipelines by ~1000× for TB-scale datasets

work.name: IIT Kharagpur (KLIV Lab)
work.summary: Worked on medical imaging and super-resolution.
highlights: Developed arbitrary-scale ultrasound super-resolution model outperforming baselines
Built reproducible training pipeline with data versioning and experiment tracking
Processed 100K+ medical images across distributed GPU clusters
Working on multi-modal foundation model for medical imaging

work.name: Manipal Institute of Technology
work.summary: Applied Generative Flow Networks for drug discovery.
highlights: Generated novel drug candidates for S. Aureus using GFlowNets

projects.name: Project Tirtha (Open Source)
projects.summary: Integrated VGGT-based reconstruction achieving ~1000× faster inference for 3D pipelines.

projects.name: Gurukul Platform
projects.summary: Full-stack tutoring platform enabling global onboarding.

projects.name: Monocular Depth Estimation for Terrain Mapping
projects.summary: Generated depth maps from UAV imagery for autonomous exploration.

projects.name: Object Detection & Localization (ODLC)
projects.summary: Real-time perception pipeline for autonomous vehicles.

awards.title: 3rd Place - IGVC 2025 AutoNav Challenge
awards.summary: Achieved global 3rd place in autonomous ground vehicle competition.

awards.title: 1st Place (Drones) & 3rd Overall - ISDC 2025
awards.summary: Built monocular depth-based terrain mapping system.
